overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt path through tall grasslands at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring a dark atmospheric environment with dense vegetation lining both sides of the trail.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt path cutting through dense tall grasslands at night. The scene is illuminated only by a flashlight beam revealing the winding trail ahead, with dark silhouettes of distant trees visible on the horizon. The environment is isolated and atmospheric, with no other characters or structures in sight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt path that cuts through an oppressive, nocturnal grassland. It begins with the camera advancing steadily into the darkness, where a narrow flashlight beam is the sole source of light carving through the dense vegetation. As the camera pushes further along the winding trail, the beam reveals the rhythmic sway of tall grasses lining the path. The scene then extends toward the horizon, where the isolated environment opens up to reveal the stark, dark silhouettes of distant trees against a midnight sky.
